title: A New Island Home
article_text: My neighbor is an artist who drew a map of the island. The entire north of the island is a forest, and a senior man lives there. We need a good introduction to the concept of our project. The requirement for the trip is to confirm our flight before we leave. We will refuse to use any transport that harms the environment. A crowd will emerge from the forest to watch the football game. Neither my friend nor I can solve the problem of the old conflict. We must survive on this island and reform our old habits. The photo shows the presence of a beautiful beach on the left. Everyone should help each other to survive, and that is the entire truth.

sentences.en: My neighbor is an artist who drew a map of the island.
sentences.zh: 我的邻居是一位艺术家，他画了一张这个岛的地图。

words.eng_def: a person who lives near you
land with water all around it

sentences.en: The entire north of the island is a forest, and a senior man lives there.
sentences.zh: 岛的整个北部是一片森林，一位年长的老人住在那里。

sentences.en: We need a good introduction to the concept of our project.
sentences.zh: 我们需要对我们的项目概念做一个好的介绍。

words.eng_def: the act of making something known for the first time

sentences.en: The requirement for the trip is to confirm our flight before we leave.
sentences.zh: 这次旅行的要求是我们在离开前确认航班。

words.eng_def: to say that something is true or correct
past tense of leave; went away from

sentences.en: We will refuse to use any transport that harms the environment.
sentences.zh: 我们将拒绝使用任何危害环境的交通工具。

words.eng_def: a way of moving people or things from one place to another

sentences.en: A crowd will emerge from the forest to watch the football game.
sentences.zh: 一群人将从森林里出来观看足球比赛。

words.eng_def: to come out from a place
a game with a round ball that players kick

sentences.en: Neither my friend nor I can solve the problem of the old conflict.
sentences.zh: 我和我的朋友都无法解决这个旧冲突的问题。

words.eng_def: not one and not the other
to find an answer to a problem

sentences.en: We must survive on this island and reform our old habits.
sentences.zh: 我们必须在这个岛上生存下来，并改革我们的旧习惯。

words.eng_def: to change something to make it better

sentences.en: The photo shows the presence of a beautiful beach on the left.
sentences.zh: 这张照片显示左边有一个美丽的海滩。

words.eng_def: a picture made with a camera
the state of being in a place
the side that is opposite of right

sentences.en: Everyone should help each other to survive, and that is the entire truth.
sentences.zh: 每个人都应该互相帮助以求生存，这就是全部真相。

quiz.question_en: How do you say '要求' in English?
Which word means 'to come out from a place'?
What is the English word for '年长的'?
Which word means 'to find an answer to a problem'?
How do you say '两者都不' in English?

image_prompts: An artist neighbor drawing a map of an island on a table.
A forest covering the entire north part of an island, with an old man walking.
A person giving an introduction about a project concept to a group.
A person checking a flight ticket on a phone before leaving home.
A person refusing to use a smoky bus, pointing to a clean bicycle.
A crowd of people coming out of a forest to watch a football match on a field.
Two people thinking hard, with a picture of a conflict between two groups on a wall.
People building a small shelter on an island, throwing away old bad habits.
A photo showing a beautiful beach on the left side of the frame.
People helping each other on an island, with a bright sun and a sign saying 'truth'.
